title: LAir's Dimension
description: This mod adds a new dimension to Minecraft with several new biomes, mobs and bosses.
body:
# A New Dimension  

This mod introduces a brand-new dimension featuring **three exclusive biomes**, along with unique structures, mobs, and blocks!  

## The Portal  

To access the dimension, you’ll need to construct a portal and light it with flint.  

![The portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2608f923282f8a1c63898bb4349493ff670e470.jpeg)  

## Magma Biome  

In this fiery biome, you’ll discover a special structure housing a powerful boss. Defeating this boss rewards you with the **Lava Stick**.  

![The lava boss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d276ef6a3442442007cbaf1fa90b770e29d70bd.jpeg)  

The **Lava Stick** is a mighty weapon capable of shooting magical fireballs.  

![The lava stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4afeae516acee581066183c497d01cd8ef00864f.jpeg)  

## Ash Desert  

The **Ash Desert** is a barren wasteland, sparsely populated with **Ash Trees** and mobs resembling husks.  

![The Ash Desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edcf2b025bee47b624386519f0393aac713e3e4b.jpeg)  

Beware of the ash blocks scattered on the ground—they inflict a **slowness effect** on players. However, the **Ash Husks** are immune to this effect and can chase you without being slowed down!  

![Ash Husks chasing the player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e397028fb76680c21cf86d63e9d51a588fae767f.jpeg)  

## Ice Plains  

In this frozen biome, you’ll encounter the fearsome **Yeti**, residing in its icy castle. Prepare for a challenging battle!  

![The Yeti](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56c85918a755896351b95c400163e48a1d81abfe.jpeg)  

Defeating the Yeti grants you the **Icy Boots**, which boost your speed when walking on snow.  

![The Icy Boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db6f29f45baf51e45331045d0d87d0b3b2029be4.jpeg)  

## Learn More  

For additional details, check out this video where I showcase the mod’s creation:
